response: You have a tiny blue marble. Choose one of these holes to place it in: the small circular one, the big circular one, or the big square one. Which one do you pick?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a small blue marble. Put it into one of these holes: the small round one, the large round one, or the large square one. Which one?
